regions.text: These are two walls. Which of them is thicker? Is wall A or wall B thicker?
These are two cuts. Which of them is wider? Is cut A or cut B wider?
These are two nails. Which of them is longer?
Which of these two men is stronger?
Which of these two pencils is shorter?
Which of these two cards is longer? Which is wider?
Which of these three angles is a right angle?
Which of these things are broken?
